new: Added download functionality to the Spanish Manga section.
Added the English CD Drama section with available content.
Added new English content to the Constellation section.
Integrated the navigation menu into the Anime section and other pages for a more consistent experience.
improvements: Performed general adjustments across the website, including menus, styles, and download functionality.
Improved download handling across multiple sections for a more reliable user experience.
Adjusted the Anime section styling to reduce the dark appearance and provide a brighter, more balanced visual design.
Improved overall navigation consistency by expanding the shared menu system across additional sections.
Refined various interface elements and visual details throughout the website.
fixes: Fixed the OST section by adding functional download buttons for available music releases.
Resolved various issues related to content downloads and resource access.
Fixed layout and usability inconsistencies across several pages.
notes: This update focuses on general improvements, download functionality fixes, navigation consistency, visual refinements, and the expansion of available content across multiple sections.

new: Added a dedicated Music page featuring official soundtrack releases and related music.
Added the first three official Adachi to Shimamura OST albums to the music archive.
Expanded the English Manga section by adding Volumes 1 through 9.
Unified the Mini Anime and Anime sections into a single, comprehensive Anime page.
improvements: Completely redesigned the Anime page with a cleaner layout, improved navigation, and better content organization.
Refactored the Anime section internally for easier maintenance and future content updates.
Enhanced the overall UI/UX of the Anime page with improved spacing, typography, and visual hierarchy.
Improved the built-in PDF reader with a smoother reading experience and better usability.
fixes: Fixed untranslated interface elements that remained in the English Manga section.
Resolved various localization inconsistencies across manga-related pages.
notes: This update expands the archive with dedicated music content, significantly improves the Anime section through a complete redesign and consolidation, and continues expanding the English manga collection.

new: Added a fully customizable reading experience inspired by modern e-book readers.
Added Light, Sepia, and Dark reading themes.
Added adjustable font size, font family, line spacing, and reading width settings.
Added persistent reader preferences using local storage.
Added a redesigned reader settings panel accessible directly from the reading view.
Added a new 'What is Adachi to Shimamura?' expandable information panel for first-time visitors.
Added informative series tags including the author, genre, publication year, and publisher.
Added a dedicated Extra Stories page featuring bonus stories, special chapters, and supplementary content.
Added 41 fully translated English Extra Stories.
Added support for user feedback submissions.
improvements: Redesigned the homepage while preserving the original dreamy aesthetic.
Improved the overall visual hierarchy with better spacing and section balance.
Refined the glassmorphism throughout the site with softer borders, shadows, and transparency.
Redesigned the navigation cards with improved typography, spacing, and hover interactions.
Improved typography across the website with a stronger emphasis on readability.
Refined the hero section to better showcase the bicycle illustration.
Enhanced release cards with improved layouts and clearer information hierarchy.
Replaced the previous About This Site section with a dedicated introduction to the series.
Improved the language selector with cleaner interactions and visual polish.
Enhanced background effects including clouds, stars, floating elements, and animations.
Improved button hover states and microinteractions throughout the interface.
Increased spacing and consistency across all major sections.
Standardized border radii, shadows, transitions, and component spacing for a more cohesive design.
Optimized the reading experience for desktop, tablet, and mobile devices.
Improved the organization and discoverability of bonus content through the new Extra Stories archive.
fixes: Fixed inconsistent spacing across multiple homepage components.
Fixed various alignment inconsistencies in cards and interactive elements.
Fixed typography inconsistencies throughout the site.
Fixed visual inconsistencies between different glass panels.
Improved responsiveness across a variety of screen sizes.
notes: This update delivers the largest visual refresh since launch, introducing a significantly improved reading experience, a redesigned homepage, and a dedicated Extra Stories archive containing 41 English-translated bonus stories.

new: Added the Stats for Nerds page with interactive charts and visualizations.
Added a dedicated About page featuring project information, translation credits, legal notices, version history, and support resources.
Added a Support the Original Work section with official links for the light novel, manga, author, and related resources.
Added a Track section with links to popular tracking platforms such as MyAnimeList, AniList, MangaUpdates, Anime-Planet, and Kitsu.
improvements: Expanded the website with additional reference resources.
Improved overall navigation and presentation across the site.
Reorganized the About page by placing the Support the Original Work section before the Legal Notice section.
Improved the consistency of the Support and Track sections with unified button styles and layouts.
fixes: Fixed icons that were not displaying correctly in the Support the Original Work section.
Fixed branding icons across Support and Track buttons for better visual consistency.
notes: This update focuses on expanding the archive with informational pages and improving the overall user experience.

new: Added list and grid view options for the Light Novels and Manga pages.
Added a search bar for faster content discovery.
Introduced an improved reading interface.
improvements: Further reorganized the project structure for improved maintainability.
Separated page data into JSON files for easier management.
Improved English ↔ Spanish language switching and localization logic.
Enhanced the UI/UX of the Light Novels and Manga sections.
notes: This release lays the foundation for easier future content updates and localization.

improvements: Reorganized the project's file structure following better separation of concerns.
Moved embedded CSS into dedicated stylesheet files.
Improved project organization and maintainability.
notes: Internal refactor with no major user-facing changes.
